#  Customize the Column Display in the RFIs Tool 
##  Background 
You can customize the columns in the RFIs tools so it shows data that is relevant to you and your project.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool.
  2. On the right side of the **Items** or **Recycle Bin** views, click the vertical ellipsis (⋮).
  3. Choose from these options:
     * **Show a Column**
     * **Hide a Column**
     * **Reorder the Columns** Grab the column name by the dots (⁞⁞). Then use a drag-and-drop operation to place the column into the desired position in the list. 
     * **Restore the Default Settings**
     * **Adjust the Row Height of the Table**


## See Also
  * [RFIs - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * [Resize the Column Width in the RFIs Log](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/resize-the-column-width-in-the-rfis-log)
  * [Create, Edit, or Delete Saved Views for RFIs](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/create-edit-or-delete-saved-views-for-rfis)
title: Customize the Column Display in the RFIs Tool
description: How to show, hide, and change the order of the columns in view in the RFIs tool.
